description: Great experience. Easy to use. Would recommend.
author: Milica K.
pros: That you don't need to talk to people, just select when you want to go on vacation and wait for you manager to approve.
cons: There isn't a thing I do not like about it.

review_title: Hrvey, essential asset to company and employees
author: Anja Z.
pros: Simplicity, a way to connect to Google Calendar
cons: I wish colors translated to Google calendar

author: Gabriel F.
pros: easy to use, and the free tier is goodwe are using to schedule our day offs and vacation and its working fine so far
cons: missing features and configurationsalso missing holidays
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All of our staff are really happy with the move to Hrvey, rare for new apps
description: Excellent, very grateful to have this app, hope we never have to go to another system because it is so easy to use.
author: Amanda Y.
pros: We tripled our staff and needed a better way to track time off. Tried Hrvey and a few other demo's. We have a high workload and not much time for steep learning curves. Hrvey does have a small learning curve to set up your staff properly (hours of work, vacation and leave allowances) but for staff it was fast, easy, seamless, no onboarding time needed at all. I get emails when staff request time off and can approve time off in the email immediately, don't even need to go to the site.
cons: Its flexibility in terms of set-up is a plus, but does mean we had to do a few trial runs to ensure that people were properly set up. Our staff often take half days so we needed to figure out how to set up leave to allow for half days, but it was pretty quick to sort out after a few test runs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: When we first implemented the program there was skepticism about the tracking and approval. It was so easy and user friendly that those worries diminished in a short time. It's a slick program!
author: Sandra B.
pros: This is a slick tool that is very easy to use. I like how it keeps track so I don't have to spend extra time recording.
cons: There isn't really anything about it that I don't like. I suppose the worry of the tracking not being accurate was a dislike, but it is accurate and that worry is gone.

description: Hrvey, makes tracking time off extemely easy from a payroll perspective. For staff, they can easily and clearly track time off taken and remaining annual leave.
author: Elizabeth M.
pros: Ease Of Use. Great dashboard. Can add different teams.
cons: There is nothing that I don't like - now that you can book off in hourly increments.

author: Larisa P.
pros: easy to learn, to run through and to utilise <3
cons: everything is well designed, so nothing on last place

author: Aaron C.
pros: It's simplistic, it does one thing but very well. Amazingly intuitive and great for small to medium size teams. It also has slack integration which makes it extremely easy to book PTO.
cons: Hrvey is simple, but maybe too simple. Would love to see more features while also keeping it easy and light to use.

author: Kathryn B.
pros: Easy to use and track time. My manager always sees my requests quickly and approves them
cons: It's sometimes slow to load and the platform.

description: I've worked with Hrvey for a while now, and it's really simple to use. It's not tied to anything else, like a suite you have to sign up for before you use. It's one of those external apps we depend on at my organisation.
author: Love I.
pros: The fact that it's simple to use, and has only a few questions when I book time off.
cons: If I had to pick, I'd say the front end design. Not very pretty, but it works.

description: Fantastic. It revolutionised the way we book holidays and time off in our department.
author: chris S.
pros: It is so flexible and easy to navigate. It makes it easy to manage staff holidays and time off.
cons: I can't think of anything I dislike about it.

description: My experience is that it's great tool & efficient to use & intuitive
author: Marta B.
pros: It is fast, efficient, & easy to use. You can see the time off your colleagues have booked off.
cons: I prefer if some sections were color coded

description: Easy to use for none technical people clean interface. With us using Hrvey every day it has really help our work flow with our team.
author: Brady M.
pros: Really easy to set up. Easy for new users that have never used it. Easy to read and understand.
cons: A dark mode and a Desktop app would be really useful.

review_title: Moving from paper-based to HRvey couldn't have been easier
description: Overall the experience has been great. It was a simple solution to a simple problem. When the problems got more complex, the solutions remained simple. You don't need any specialist skills, knowledge or training to use it. Everyone started using it with no issues at all and it has cut down on paperwork and admin time.
author: Niamh F.
pros: This software is the easiest software I have used for a work process. We have gone from a paper-based system that had a lot of admin involved for a work process that should have been far less admin-heavy. HRvey is easy to set-up, easy to use, easy to see what's going on and also very cost-effective. The simplicity of using it just makes so much sense. Customer service is brilliant too, always quick to answer questions and always try to offer a workable solution.
cons: We probably needed more functionality than such a simple leave tracker was able to offer, such as wanting to be able to track who is in the office and who is working from home on any given day. But for the most part the team at HRvey have been able to offer a suitable work-around so that we have been able get what we needed. And where that wasn't possible the team have taken onboard what our needs are and will consider them for any future updates - definitely feel heard

description: been using htis for ages now. very good system and very good support
author: Paul H.
pros: Simple, easy to use and manage with great support
cons: not much - it's a great system. Could probably do with some more with reports / analytics etc

author: James H.
pros: I like how it easily tells me how many days I have left for holiday, and allows me to book half days easily.
cons: There isn't specifically I dislike, the only minor inconvenience is that I have to click an extra button to take time off.

description: We use hrvey as our "time off request" system and it's great for that! Highly recommended.
author: Carolyn W.
pros: Hrvey is so easy to setup; perfectly simple and serves my needs well. Whenever I have a problem, I'm able to get help within 24 hours - sometimes within as little as an hour. The customer service is alone a reason to purchase this product.
cons: The setup process is a bit clunky and hard to navigate.

author: Rick F.
pros: Time tracking tools, employee work anniversaries
cons: Hourly PTO tracking would be helpful (as opposed to half-day increments)

author: Jocelyn T.
pros: Easy to use, able to customize holidays of various countries. All employees like that they can access easily through their mobiles.
cons: There is room for developments and improvements which could take time.

review_title: Easy employee leave booking and tracking
author: Rebecca F.
pros: Hrvey lets us all see when different members of the team will be off and is a super easy way to book holiday
cons: Nothing! Does exactly what we need it to :)

author: Mihaylo L.
pros: From management perspective it is a great tool for approving PTO for employees
cons: Calendar view needs improvements. View is quite simple and small touch up will make a difference

author: Ioan Mihai G.
pros: How easy amd intuitive the software is, its amazing!
cons: Some parts of the ui are not really intuitive or self explanatory

author: Ivan I.
pros: As a common user in a small software company, my requests for holidays are very easy to book - it takes only few clicks to do it. The interface is intuitive and simplifies essential HR tasks. Compared to other solutions I've used before, I'd pick Hrvey anytime. It's also integrated in slack, which makes my requests visible to my employer immediately.
cons: No cons. Keep it simple as possible just the way it is now

author: Shreyas S.
pros: - Concise platform- Efficient leave management- Sync with Google
cons: Don't think as of now, may be I will have some later.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Finley S.
pros: Ease of use and track my remaining leave
cons: No live chat with customer service button
